# Comparison of Multiple Linear Regression Models {#model-comparison-1}

```{r model-comparison-1-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/model-comparison-1-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/model-comparison-1/"
)
```

```{r child-model-comparison-1, child="../lecture-content/14-model-comparison-1.Rmd"}
```
